description_long: This object is a rectangular patch with a surface pattern of alternating horizontal stripes in black and white, interspersed with textured, dark brownish sand-like sections. The sand-textured areas are arranged in a repeating triangular motif, giving the patch a geometric, urban look. The sides of the object display the same striped and triangular sand pattern, while the top is dominated by wide black and white stripes. The sand texture appears rough and granular, contrasting with the smooth, flat appearance of the black and white stripes. The overall form is boxy and solid, suggesting a raised or contained sand patch, possibly used for demarcation or decorative purposes in an urban setting. There are no visible signs of debris or recent disturbance, and the boundaries are sharply defined by the geometric pattern.
description: A rectangular sand patch with alternating black and white stripes and rough, triangular sand-textured sections, giving it a bold, geometric appearance. The surface is visually striking and sharply defined.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped pattern with triangular sand-textured sections clearly visible between the black and white bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the dominance of the black stripes on the top and side, with less visible sand texture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view again shows the striped pattern with triangular sand-textured sections, similar to the front.
description_view_3: Back view is similar to the side, with wide black stripes and minimal visible sand texture.
attribute_boundary_definition: The boundaries are sharply defined by the geometric black and white stripes, creating a clear and regular edge.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: The sand patch appears isolated and visually distinct, with clear separation from adjacent surfaces due to the bold pattern.
